'''Suprin''' was one of the doctors aboard the ''[[Arkanian Legacy]]''. Lord [[Arkoh Adasca]] once assigned him to tutor the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Scientist/Legends|scientist]] [[Demagol]], disguised as [[Rohlan Dyre]], in science. Hours later, when he and [[Eejee Vamm]] were looking at [[Jarael]]'s blood sample, they were both shot down by Demagol to keep them from informing Adasca of Jarael's [[The Force/Legends|Force]]-[[Force-sensitive/Legends|sensitivity]].
